activity_summary: A support operations manager reviews refund escalation cases and decides approve, policy review, or missing evidence.
command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit 3x4 model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Material UI organizes the raw refund escalation brief into a triage surface while leaving the refund_case diagnostics and system details visible.

surface.heading: Refund escalation system map

selected.request: Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

info.label: Database fields
info.value: id, customer, plan, amount, request, status, evidence, policy

info.label: JSON schema validation
info.value: receipt_photo is required before manager approval

info.label: Tool call results
info.value: Purchase history confirmed renewal; support note found refund reason

evidence: Renewal date confirmed in purchase history.
Support note captures the customer's refund reason.
Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.
JSON schema validation error remains visible for missing receipt_photo.
Tool call result confirms purchase history and support note lookup.
surface.policy: Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review. The raw brief also asks the primary surface to expose table fields, schema errors, prompt version, tool results, resource id, endpoint status, and CRUD controls.

handoff.title: Receipt photo required before approval
handoff.reason: Renewal and refund reason are documented, but the receipt photo is missing and the validation issue remains unresolved.
handoff.action: Request the receipt photo, attach it to R-1842, then reopen the case for manager review.
